_notes.purpose: Common defaults for all export-import profiles. Never used alone — always merged under a corridor (e.g. india-us.json) and (optionally) commodity (e.g. india-us-textiles.json) layer per design-v1-config-architecture.md §4. Carries the 4-component skeleton (base_sofr + tariff + sovereign + wc), the stress_timing 12/3/9 shape, the 24-month quarterly tenor grid, the 250bps default loan spread, and the tariff pass_through 0.20 that are consistent across V1.
_notes.merge_position: Least specific. Loaded first by profile_resolver; corridor- and commodity-level files override these values via deep merge.
_notes.source_of_defaults: V1 SWAPS-1LOAN-WHAT-IF-3-INP-FINAL.json constants common to every corridor/commodity case: stress_timing months_to_peak=12, plateau_months=3, descent_months=9; loan_spread 250bps; tenor 24mo quarterly anchored on loan_start_date; tariff pass_through 0.20; base_sofr horizon months_to_peak=12, total_months_assumption=24.
_notes.dispatch_default: draps_v1 keeps Iteration 2-3 routed through the V1 DRAPS path so the byte-equality gate stays green. Commodity-level profiles can override to v2_direct in Iteration 4+.
